project.name: Consolidated Policy Document
project.description: Defines mandatory technical, security, and architectural rules for consistent API behavior, strong security practices, scalable and maintainable architecture, and clear backend–frontend contracts.

architecture.modulesPattern: One module corresponds to one business domain, containing one controller and one service.
architecture.sharedPattern: Shared logic must be placed in common or utils directories.
architecture.apiStyle: RESTful, resource-oriented design principles; URL format: /api/v1/<resource> using lowercase, kebab-case, plural nouns.

functional: TBD: Define at least one functional requirement from project docs.
